videos.description: Marcel Reed scores on a 3-yard rush to give Texas A&M a 14-3 lead over Arkansas.

videos.headline: Marcel Reed flips it to Nate Boerkircher for TD
videos.description: Marcel Reed finds an open Nate Boerkircher to put Texas A&M up 21-3 on a 1-yard touchdown.

videos.description: Taylen Green scrambles 27 yards for Arkansas’ first touchdown.

videos.headline: Razorbacks pull within one on Taylen Green's TD
